texto: She dreamed that somebody replaced her nerves with puppet strings. The unseen puppeteer resisted every move she made, and Nina was still ensnared when sunlight tickled her eyes open. For weeks, her actions lagged, leaden, as if cement thickened in her marrow, her skull, and her heart-bearing chest.Later, Nina learned the puppeteer’s name: Depression.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Darcie Little Badger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “She dreamed that somebody replaced her nerves with puppet strings. The unseen puppeteer resisted …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, depression, owl-vs-the-neighborhood-watch pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de owl-vs-the-neighborhood-watch.
